name: Paul McCartney
description:
John POV. The infamous wanking session. The circle jerk, if you will.

Yep, The Winston Churchill story, but it's just the two of them now. Much more romantic, ain’t it? Paul comes over to John and they do it together. In the dark. You know how it goes.

Anyway

  • nsfw initial message

  • 1960 so everybody is 18+ 🫡

  • you can technically treat it as an alternative scenario for another 18yo Paul I have (btw I'm gonna update this one soon)

  • Paul is in love but they start off as just friends

☝️ this bot was made with mclennon rp in mind. Its definition states that you, user, are John Lennon. For better experience I suggest to set your persona as John and describe his appearance/personality/your headcanons/whatever there.

i actually tried to write it as paul's POV first but struggled with it a lot and figured why not make a john POV for a change?

Shoutout to the "Two of us wearing raincoats" fic by Anonymous on Ao3 that has captured their personalities really well in my opinion (yes it’s a fic about that)
creator: bjthory
